page.title: Quotations
page.subtitle: Manage and track quotation requests
page.invitationsSubtitle: Manage your company's quotation invitations from banks

fields.cutOffTimeHelper: Deadline for companies to submit their quotation responses
fields.appraisalsToIncludeHint: Search and add one or more appraisals to this RFQ
fields.invitedCompaniesHint: Select external companies to invite for this quotation

placeholders.reason: Why is this company being rejected as winner?
placeholders.cancelReason: Why is this quotation being cancelled?
placeholders.negotiationMessage: Explain what you'd like the company to revise (e.g., target a 10% discount on items 1 and 3)
placeholders.appraisalRemark: Add any notes specific to this appraisal (conditions, assumptions, scope caveats)...
placeholders.declineReason: Please explain why you are declining this invitation...
placeholders.withdrawReason: Please explain why you no longer want to participate in this quotation...

empty.noInvitationsHint: When a bank invites your company to bid, it will appear here
empty.noAppraisals: No appraisals linked to this quotation.
empty.noAppraisalsRfq: No appraisals linked to this RFQ.
empty.selectAppraisal: Select an appraisal from the list to begin.
empty.selectAppraisalLeft: Select an appraisal from the left
empty.noDraftHint: Switch to the "Create New" tab to start one
empty.noDocumentsFound: No uploaded documents found for this request.
empty.noRequestLinked: No request linked to this appraisal. Documents cannot be loaded.

errors.unableToLoadQuotation: Unable to load quotation. You may not have access to this resource.
errors.noAppraisalLinked: No appraisal linked to this task. Cannot display quotation section.
errors.noAccessDocument: You no longer have access to this document — the quotation may have been awarded or cancelled.

toasts.saveBeforeSubmitFailed: Failed to save draft before submitting
toasts.shortlistSentToRm: Shortlist sent to RM for selection
toasts.sendToRmFailed: Failed to send shortlist to RM
toasts.shortlistRecalled: Shortlist recalled — you can now revise and re-send
toasts.winnerSelected: Tentative winner selected — admin will be notified
toasts.winnerRejected: Tentative winner rejected — quotation returned to admin review
toasts.quotationAwarded: Quotation awarded — click Assign to route externally
toasts.negotiationOpened: Negotiation round opened — awaiting company response
toasts.shortlistChanged: Shortlist changed — please re-confirm with exactly one company shortlisted.
toasts.selectWinnerFailed: Failed to select company as winner
toasts.withdrawn: You have opted out of this quotation
toasts.quotationSent: Quotation sent — companies have been notified
toasts.sendFailed: Failed to send quotation. Set shared documents via the task page before sending.
toasts.companyRequired: At least one company must be invited
toasts.appraisalRequired: At least one appraisal is required
toasts.discountExceedsFee: Discount + Negotiated Discount exceeds Fee Amount on {{number}}
toasts.enterNegotiatedDiscount: Enter a Negotiated Discount on at least one appraisal before submitting
toasts.mandaysExceeded: Estimated Mandays exceeds the maximum duration for: {{list}}
toasts.fixErrors: Please fix the highlighted errors before submitting

validation.selectionRequired: Please provide a reason for your selection
validation.noteMax: Note must be 500 characters or fewer
validation.atLeastOneItem: At least one appraisal item is required
validation.discountExceedsFee: Discount + Negotiated Discount cannot exceed Fee Amount

negotiation.title: Negotiation
negotiation.maxRoundsNote: Maximum rounds ({{max}}) reached — award or reject
negotiation.adjustDiscountHint: Adjust the per-item Discount (Negotiate) below, then click Submit Proposal to send your response to the bank.
negotiation.negotiatingWith: Negotiating with {{company}}. Round {{current}} of {{max}} ({{remaining}} remaining). The company sets the revised price by adjusting their per-item discount when they respond.

shortlist.title: Admin Review
shortlist.recallDisabledHint: RM has already picked a tentative winner — recall is disabled. Use "Reject Tentative Winner" to restart the selection.
shortlist.hint0: Shortlist one company to select directly as winner, or two or more to send to RM.
shortlist.hint1: "Select as Winner" picks this company directly; "Send to RM" forwards the shortlist for RM review.
shortlist.hintMultiple: "Select as Winner" is disabled with multiple shortlisted — use "Send to RM" instead.
shortlist.selectWinnerHint0: Shortlist exactly one company to enable
shortlist.selectWinnerHintMulti: Disabled when more than one company is shortlisted — use Send to RM instead
shortlist.sendToRmBody: You are sending {{count}} shortlisted company bid(s) to the RM for final selection. The RM will pick a tentative winner from these submissions.

finalize.title: Award Quotation
finalize.awardBody: Awarding to {{company}}. The system will commit each appraisal's fee from the per-appraisal price the winner submitted (shown below). Click "Assign" on the task to route externally. This action cannot be undone.

rejectWinner.title: Reject Tentative Winner
rejectWinner.body: You are rejecting {{company}} as the tentative winner. The quotation will return to Admin Review so you can revise and re-send the shortlist.

decline.declineBody: You are declining this invitation. The bank will be notified and you will not be able to participate in this quotation.
decline.withdrawBody: You will no longer participate in this quotation. Any information you submitted will be retracted and will not be considered.

cancel.title: Cancel Quotation
cancel.body: This will cancel quotation {{number}}. All invited companies will be notified. This action cannot be undone.
cancel.draftBody: Cancel draft {{number}}? This action cannot be undone.
cancel.standaloneBody: This will cancel quotation {{number}}. All invited companies will be notified and the workflow task will be cancelled. This action cannot be undone.

draft.draftBannerText: This quotation is a Draft. Edit details or send it to invite companies.

selectWinner.title: Select Tentative Winner
selectWinner.body: You are selecting {{company}} as the tentative winner.
selectWinner.requestNegotiationHint: Admin will see your recommendation when finalizing.
selectWinner.notePlaceholder: e.g. Target price ฿2.5M, they may be flexible on timeline...
selectWinner.rmPickInstruction: Select one of the shortlisted companies below as the tentative winner. Admin will then negotiate and award the agreement.

appraisalReport.title: Appraisal Report Listing
appraisalReport.noAppraisals: No appraisals linked to this RFQ.

email.draftingTitle: Drafting email to send to external appraisal company

picker.selectAllHint: Selected {{page}} on this page. {{total}} appraisals match your filters — refine filters or paginate to select more.
picker.maxDaysAll: Set max appraisal duration (day) for all:

shared.assignHint: Click "Assign" to route externally to this company.
shared.invitationDeclinedBody: You have declined this invitation. The bank has been notified.
shared.readOnlyBanner: This quotation is currently under {{stage}}. Only the assigned reviewer can edit it.
shared.exceededMaxDuration: Exceeds the maximum duration set by the requester ({{cap}} days).
shared.priorCompanyExcluded: 1 prior company excluded (appeal flow — most recent appraiser of this collateral).
